name: kmd
description: Knowledge-base operator for agent organizations: the kmd-ingest write protocol and kmd-lint health checks as skills, plus hooks that enforce KB invariants (generated INDEX.md, append-only LOG.md and sources/). Agent definitions for Codex ship in codex/agents/*.toml — copy them into ~/.codex/agents/ or <repo>/.codex/agents/ (Codex plugins cannot bundle agents yet).
author: yasik
